purpose: CLI and MCP request construction must contain zero escape-hatch assertions. The compiler-aware ratchet uses generated-type provenance and conservative request-bound dataflow across all potentially reaching variable and property writes, bindings, accessors, contributing expressions, spreads, helpers, Function invocation adapters, and any-erased receivers/methods while ignoring discarded comma operands, response narrows, unrelated any values, ordinary non-request assertions, and test-only fixtures. The public proof pins exact adapter import provenance and type arguments. A future exception is valid only with a complete, live governance record, but the canonical 1.0 baseline requires both package exception arrays to remain exactly empty.

requiredExceptionFields: exactly one of range or codeMarker

residueNotes.removedRequestEscape: All former request-side escapes were replaced with generated flattened requests, typed body envelopes, operation-specific strict schemas, or explicit request-option query parameters. Full-replacement writes now reconstruct and validate current state before mutation. Current governed request-cast findings: CLI 0, MCP 0.

wrapper.resolvedNote: All four strictness flags are ON for the wrapper compile (2026-06-22). The EOPT/TS4114 blockers were in the GENERATED error scaffold (src/errors/*, src/api/errors/*) + src/core/request.ts and were fixed at their source in this repo's local SDK generator scripts/generate-sdk-from-openapi.mjs (override on the cause members; explicit `| undefined` on optional scaffold props; signal `?? null`), NOT upstream in ../GOCLMCP/ (which owns only the OpenAPI spec). The former hand-written-only EOPT differential gate in check-consumer-cast-budget.mjs was retired now that `npm run type-check` enforces exactOptionalPropertyTypes + noImplicitOverride across the whole wrapper. See spec/evidence/discrepancies.md strictness.wrapper-eopt-noimplicitoverride-blocked (resolved).
